note: missing closing brace: Node parse throws->unparsed; Rust sees method+id substrings->request
truncated mid-string value: Node throws->unparsed; Rust has method+id->request, method val raw='too'
trailing comma invalid JSON: Node throws->unparsed; Rust method+id->request
trailing comma, only method substring: Node unparsed; Rust method,no id->notification
single-quoted keys invalid JSON: Node unparsed; Rust needs literal "method"/"id" double-quoted, absent->unknown
JS comment after object: Node throws->unparsed; Rust method+id->request
JS block comment inside: Node throws->unparsed; Rust method+id->request
unquoted keys: Node throws->unparsed; Rust value side has no "method"/"id" tokens->unknown
unquoted keys, no quoted tokens: Node unparsed; Rust no "error"/"id" tokens->unknown
NaN not valid JSON: Node throws->unparsed; Rust method+id substrings->request
Infinity invalid JSON: Node unparsed; Rust id+error,no method->error
leading-zero number invalid JSON: Node throws->unparsed; Rust method+id->request
leading-plus number invalid JSON: Node unparsed; Rust id present,no method,no error->response
hex number invalid JSON: Node unparsed; Rust method+id->request
unquoted bare text: Node throws->unparsed; Rust no key tokens->unknown
bare text containing literal "method" token: Node throws->unparsed; Rust method,no id->notification
valid JSON null -> falsy msg: Node f.msg falsy->unparsed; Rust no tokens->unknown
valid JSON false -> falsy msg: Node unparsed; Rust no tokens->unknown
valid JSON 0 -> falsy: Node f.msg falsy->unparsed; Rust no tokens->unknown
valid JSON empty string -> falsy: Node unparsed; Rust no tokens->unknown
valid JSON true (truthy non-object): Node classify(true): method/id undefined->unknown; Rust no tokens->unknown
valid JSON number 42 (truthy): Node classify(42): no fields->unknown; Rust no tokens->unknown
valid JSON float (truthy): Node unknown; Rust no tokens->unknown
valid JSON non-empty string (truthy): Node classify('hi') no fields->unknown; Rust no tokens->unknown
valid JSON string equal to method: Node classify(string) no fields->unknown; Rust closing quote yields "method" token,no id->notification
valid JSON array (truthy, .method/.id undefined): Node unknown; Rust no tokens->unknown
valid JSON array of one request: Node array .method undefined->unknown; Rust substrings method+id->request
unterminated array invalid JSON: Node throws->unparsed; Rust method+id->request
valid JSON duplicate method: Node last wins method='second'->request; Rust method+id->request, Rust string_field first='first' -> method DIVERGES
valid JSON dup id: Node last wins id=0 (hasId true)->request; Rust method+id->request; agree
raw TAB control char in string invalid JSON: Node throws->unparsed; Rust method+id->request
trailing garbage after valid object: Node throws (unexpected token)->unparsed; Rust method+id->request
two concatenated objects on one line: Node throws->unparsed; Rust has id+method tokens->request
leading BOM stripped by trim, rest bare text: Node parse 'not json' throws->unparsed; Rust no tokens->unknown
boundary: well-formed request both proxies agree request/method=ping
